creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
This is less flexible (for testing pre-releases), less reliable (maybe missing, may contain garbage, may miss some files or maybe generated from different a commit), less consistent (with other VA-API ports) and obsolete after ports c2828a7218a7.

$ fetch 'https://codeload.github.com/intel/libva/tar.gz/2.13.0?dummy=/intel-libva-2.13.0_GH0.tar.gz'
$ fetch https://github.com/intel/libva/releases/download/2.13.0/libva-2.13.0.tar.bz2
$ du -Ash *libva*tar*
251K    intel-libva-2.13.0_GH0.tar.gz
485K    libva-2.13.0.tar.bz2

$ tar xf *.tar.gz
$ tar xf *.tar.bz2

$ diff <(tar tf *.tar.gz | sed 's,[^/]*/,,' | sort ) <(tar tf *.tar.bz2 | sed 's,[^/]*/,,' | sort)
--- /tmp/zshl7jxwb
+++ /tmp/zsh023BfN
@@ -1,45 +1,48 @@
